LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAULA JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. DISCUSSED. THERE HAVE BEEN NO OBJECTIONS OR OPPOSITION TO THE SETTLEMENT. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION. A FINAL ACCOUNTING REPORT WILL BE DUE MARCH 12, 2024, AND A COMPLIANCE HEARING WILL BE SCHEDULED FOR MARCH 26, 2024, AT 9:30 AM. Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PAULA JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT.

Appearances via Zoom: David Spivak of the Spivak Law Firm (213.725.9094) for plaintiffs and moving parties; Peter Choi of Gordon Rees (213.929.2401) for defendant and responding party; No other appearances.

Discussed. There have been no objections or opposition to the settlement. The Court grants the motion. A final accounting report will be due March 12, 2024, and a compliance hearing will be scheduled for March 26, 2024, at 9:30 am. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order and proposed judgment. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):

Peter Choi, Esq. 213-576-5000 Gordon & Rees LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. No one appeared to oppose the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAULA JOHNSON's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement" is granted; In addition, Final Approval Hearing is set for 7/10/23 at 9:30am in Dept. 302.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
